constructors.name: initialize
constructors.summary: The #initialize method creates a new Layout::Image from a given image file.
constructors.remarks: The #initialize method creates a new Layout::Image from a given image file.

throws.when: if there was an error reading the image file, such as the file name being invalid
if there was an error allocating memory for the image

properties.name: clip_mask
properties.summary: The #clip_mask method returns the clip mask of the Layout::Image, or nil if it does not have a clip mask.
properties.remarks: The #clip_mask method returns the clip mask of the Layout::Image, or nil if it does not have a clip mask.
